title: Yuki's Animal Sounds
synopsis: Baby Yuki discovers different animal sounds as she explores her backyard with her grandmother, learning to make moo, woof, chirp, and meow sounds while meeting friendly farm animals and pets.

illustration.description: A cheerful Japanese-American toddler girl with straight black hair in small pigtails sits in a sunny backyard. She has bright brown eyes and wears a soft yellow dress with small flower patterns. A friendly brown and white cow peeks over a low wooden fence nearby, looking gentle with large kind eyes. The background shows green grass and pastel blue sky with fluffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Yuki sitting in backyard hearing a cow say moo

pages.text: Big cow says moo! Yuki says moo!

illustration.description: Yuki stands with arms outstretched, mouth open in a happy 'moo' sound, mimicking the cow. Her grandmother, an elderly Japanese woman with silver hair in a neat bun, wearing a lavender cardigan, smiles warmly beside her. The cow's head is visible over the fence, also appearing to 'moo' with mouth slightly open. Soft morning light creates a warm, golden glow.
illustration.alt: Yuki and grandmother making moo sounds with the cow

illustration.description: A playful golden retriever runs toward Yuki in the garden, tail wagging enthusiastically. Yuki claps her hands with delight, eyes wide with excitement. Her grandmother watches from a garden bench nearby. Colorful flowers in soft pinks and purples line the garden path. The dog's mouth is open in a friendly bark, ears flopping as it runs.
illustration.alt: Yuki hearing a dog bark woof woof in the garden

pages.text: Happy dog says woof! Yuki says woof!

illustration.description: Yuki kneels on the soft grass, hands cupped around her mouth making a 'woof' sound while the golden retriever sits beside her, both appearing to bark together. The dog's pink tongue hangs out happily. Grandmother sits on the bench in the background, hands clasped together with joy. Dappled sunlight filters through leaves overhead.
illustration.alt: Yuki and dog both making woof sounds together

illustration.description: Three small colorful birds perch on a low tree branch above Yuki's head - one yellow finch, one red cardinal, and one blue jay. Yuki looks up with wonder, pointing at the birds. Her grandmother stands beside her, also gazing upward with a gentle smile. The tree has soft green leaves and small pink blossoms. Musical notes seem to float in the air around the chirping birds.
illustration.alt: Yuki looking up at chirping birds in a tree

pages.text: Little birds say chirp! Yuki says chirp!

illustration.description: Yuki stands on her tiptoes with arms raised toward the sky, mouth open making chirping sounds. The birds on the branch appear to be singing back to her, beaks open. Grandmother holds her hands up near her mouth, also making bird sounds. The scene is filled with warm afternoon light, and flower petals drift gently in the breeze.
illustration.alt: Yuki, grandmother, and birds all making chirp sounds together

illustration.description: A fluffy orange tabby cat sits on a stone garden step, looking directly at Yuki with bright green eyes. Yuki crouches down to the cat's level, eyes bright with curiosity. Her grandmother approaches carrying a small bowl of milk. The cat's mouth is slightly open in a gentle meow. Lavender bushes frame the stone steps, and butterflies flutter nearby.
illustration.alt: Yuki meeting a cat that says meow meow

pages.text: Soft cat says meow! Yuki says meow!

illustration.description: Yuki gently pets the purring orange cat while both appear to be 'meowing' - Yuki with her mouth in a small 'o' shape, the cat with eyes half-closed contentedly. Grandmother kneels beside them, watching with loving eyes. The cat arches its back happily under Yuki's gentle touch. Warm golden hour light bathes the peaceful scene.
illustration.alt: Yuki petting cat while both make meow sounds

pages.text: Yuki loves all the sounds! Moo, woof, chirp, meow!

illustration.description: Yuki stands in the center of the garden with arms spread wide and the biggest smile, surrounded by all her new animal friends - the cow at the fence, the dog sitting nearby, birds on the tree branch, and the cat at her feet. Grandmother stands behind her with arms outstretched in the same joyful pose. All the animals appear to be making their sounds simultaneously in a happy chorus. Rainbow-colored sound waves seem to dance around everyone.
illustration.alt: Yuki celebrating with all the animals making their sounds together

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the cow make?
questions.explanation: Cows say 'moo' - Yuki learned this sound first in the story!

questions.question: Who helps Yuki learn about animal sounds?
questions.explanation: Yuki's grandmother is with her throughout the story, watching and learning sounds together.

questions.question: What color is the cat in the story?
questions.explanation: The cat is described as a fluffy orange tabby cat that says meow!

pages.text: Happy dog says ___! Little birds say ___!
